feedItems.description: allocated £91.1m to Children's Social Care (≈£174 per resident)
allocated £217.0m to Adult Social Care (≈£414 per resident)
allocated £55.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£105 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £113 (4.8%) to £2443
